title: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai
posterAlt: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai (1998) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Per her mother's last wish, an 8 year old girl sets out to reunite her father with his college best friend who was in love with him.
synopsis: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai is a 1998 romance, drama and comedy film from India. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1990s and genre rankings. It carries a 14A certification (CA rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
